label: Industry Analysis
definition: Analyst assessment and industry-level analysis based on market knowledge and expert opinion

label: Field Research
definition: Primary research including customer interviews and vendor briefings

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Structured comparison of vendor capabilities products and market positions

label: Secondary Research
definition: Analysis based on publicly available information and secondary sources

label: Vendor-Provided
definition: Data provided by the vendor (Dell) including pricing, service specifications, and program details

label: Independent Software Vendor
definition: Software company building applications on third-party platforms

label: Systems Integrator
definition: Professional services firm specializing in technology implementation

label: Research Firm
definition: Industry analyst and research organization

label: Telecommunications Carrier
definition: Telecommunications service provider or equipment vendor

label: Active
definition: Technology is currently actively maintained, developed, and commercially available

label: Acquired
definition: Entity acquired by another company; brand may no longer exist independently

label: Dissolved
definition: Organization ceased operations

label: Merged
definition: Organization merged with one or more entities to form new entity

label: Renamed
definition: Organization continues under different name

label: Split
definition: Entity was split into two or more successor organizations.

label: Unknown
definition: Current status of entity is not determined.

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology no longer in active use or commercial support; superseded by successor technologies

label: Legacy
definition: Product no longer actively marketed but may still receive limited support

label: Emerging
definition: Technology was new and growing rapidly at time of study; limited market penetration

label: Growth at Study Date
definition: Technology was in growth phase at time of study

label: Mature
definition: Technology fully developed with established market and widespread adoption

label: Market Assessment
definition: Analyst evaluation of a product's or company's competitive standing in the market

label: Market Size
definition: Quantitative estimate of market value or volume

label: Market Driver
definition: Identified force driving market growth or change

label: Competitive Position
definition: Study-specific code: competitive-position

label: Product Specification
definition: Technical specification or product capability detail

label: Product Feature
definition: Methodology: Documented product feature from vendor materials

label: Product Announcement
definition: Study-specific code: product-announcement

label: Pricing
definition: Product or service pricing information

label: Deployment Metric
definition: Metric related to product deployment or adoption

label: Organizational Metric
definition: Metric about an organization such as headcount or revenue

label: Financial Metric
definition: Revenue, profit or financial performance data

label: Analyst Prediction
definition: Forward-looking prediction made by analyst

label: Analyst Assessment
definition: Analysis based on Aberdeen Group analyst evaluation and judgment

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Empirical evaluation of a specific technology product or system based on hands-on testing, performance measurement, or documented behavior

label: Standard Adoption
definition: Status of technology standard adoption

label: Partnership Metric
definition: Information about partnerships or alliances

label: Migration Strategy
definition: Approach for technology migration or transition

label: Planned Feature
definition: Announced but not yet available product feature

label: Open Standards
definition: Information about open standards compliance or API design

label: Buyer Profile
definition: Description of target customer or buyer characteristics

label: Competitive Landscape
definition: Study-specific code: competitive-landscape

label: Program Benefit
definition: Articulated benefit of a program or initiative

label: Sales Channel
definition: Description of how a product is sold or distributed

label: Market Positioning
definition: Strategic market positioning information

label: Strategy Assessment
definition: Assessment of strategic approach or direction

label: Organizational Attribute
definition: Non-financial attribute of an organization

label: Market Need
definition: Identified unmet need in the market

label: Partnership Type
definition: Type and nature of a partnership arrangement

label: Co-opetition
definition: Competitive-cooperative relationship between parties

label: Technical Specification
definition: Study-specific code: technical-specification

label: Smart ContAct Components
definition: Components of HP Smart ContAct program

label: Deployment Mode
definition: Mode or configuration of product deployment

label: High Confidence
definition: Assessment or data point is well-supported by multiple sources, specific numbers, or direct document citations

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Finding supported by qualitative analysis, expert interpretation, or retrospective assessment with reasonable evidence

label: Low Confidence
definition: Finding is inferred from limited evidence in the source text or involves significant extrapolation

label: Product Profile
definition: A detailed evaluation of a specific vendor's product, including features, competitive positioning, and buying recommendations

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Retrospective record of what actually happened to a company, product, or technology after the study date; used to assess prescience

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Observation records an analyst judgment, interpretation, or recommendation that goes beyond raw data to offer evaluative conclusions

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative data point about market size, pricing, cost structures, or commercial dynamics derived from research

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Observation is a forward-looking prediction about future market conditions, technology adoption, or business outcomes made at time of study

label: Document Review
definition: Assessment based on review of published documentation such as vendor support policies and threat databases

label: Field Research
definition: Primary research conducted through direct interaction with products, services, or market participants in real-world settings

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Qualitative and quantitative assessment of industry trends, competitive dynamics, and market conditions using publicly available information
